channel.title: Terra Reform News
channel.description: Updates from Terra Reform — new projects, competition results, and milestones.

item.title: terra-reform.org Gets a Major Upgrade
item.description: Our website now features an interactive project timeline, a recognition overview, working contact and application forms, light and dark themes, and a newsletter.

item.title: Solar-Powered School Microgrids Initiative Kicks Off
item.description: Our newest project, developed through the New York Academy of Sciences challenge program, investigates how solar generation, battery storage, and smart energy management can turn schools into clean energy hubs.

item.title: Superconductor Research Proposal Submitted to CERN BL4S
item.description: Team Spartacus completed "Superconductivity Preservation in NbN Thin Films: The Role of Lead Coating Under Proton Irradiation" and submitted it to the CERN Beamline for Schools 2025 competition.

item.title: Two Projects Head to TEKNOFEST
item.description: Braille Circuits and Safe Explorer both completed their development cycles for TEKNOFEST competitions.

item.title: Virtual Physics Laboratory Named TÜBİTAK 2204-A Regional Finalist
item.description: Our Roblox-based virtual physics laboratory earned Regional Finalist status in the TÜBİTAK 2204-A High School Research Projects Competition.

item.title: Terra Reform Is Born
item.description: A group of students with a shared passion for science, technology, and societal impact founded Terra Reform.
